spec.name: The End Of Long Tunnel
spec.description: You are at a end of a long tunnel. Right in front of you, you can see a grey mass. To the east you can see a tremendously long tunnel, but you know that, you were just there.

east.description: A long tunnel. JUST like in the description!

west.description: A grey mass is blocking the way.

extra_descs.description: The mass is nothing but a mass, but it is quite suspicious!
